Period_Start: The starting date of the period during which the data was collected
Period_End: The ending date of the period during which the data was collected
Communication_Channel: The medium through which the communication was made. This can be social media, live chat, or texting
Customer_Segment: The specific group of customers for whom the promotions were personalized. In this context, it refers to 'Centennial shoppers'
Conversion_Rate_Increase: The increase in conversion rate attributed to the use of personalized messages sent through AI compared to standard promotions
Promotion_Type: The type of promotion. In this case, personalized promotions through conversational AI
